goal: add_fns(constant(c), f, x) = const_add_left(c, f, x)
proof: add_fns(constant[Real, Real](c), f, x) != c + f(x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](c, x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Real, x1: T0, x2: T0 -> Real) { x0(x1) + x2(x1) = add_fns[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[Real](f, x, constant[Real, Real](c))
function(x0: Real -> Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0(x1) + x2 = const_add_right(x0, x2, x1) }(f, x, c)

goal: add_fns(f, constant(c), x) = const_add_right(f, c, x)
